title: Trans Mod
body:
Hiya!

This mod adds to Minecraft transgender related content. In this mod you have transgender-related flags, hormones, transgender mascots (like Blahaj) and many others!

This is my first mod, please be gentle. Thank you!

Created in MCreator.

Much loves. 💖

Eliza



Notice: **This mod is Alpha phase**, more things will be coming soon! Maybe contains bugs, etc.

Mod currently works on NeoForge, support for more modloaders soon!


Screenshots:
![Transgender flags in Minecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31ebf4bb7f837a00fe571daf072999ec46df806b.png)

![Estradiol pill in Minecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/289c35f25ee38bdc2d7bfc7c743965092786bbeb.png)

![Plush shark Blahaj in Minecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bec5ff334aa721e95cf389b3bc26a1e22b478d80.png)
